name: Poster Rotator
description: Fill a local poster pool per movie from providers, then periodically rotate the Primary Poster image from the pool. This keeps Jellyfin looking fresh with rotating poster images on an interval of your choosing.

versions.changelog: Compatibility: targets Jellyfin 12.0.0.0 beta while keeping plugin version 1.7.0.0. Scheduler: adds the Poster Rotator category with Rotate posters and Nettoyage pools orphelins tasks. Packaging: includes meta.json and a local plugin image for manual zip installs. Performance: processes randomized library item ids in batches, respects cooldowns, and allows MaxRotationsPerRun=0 as no per-run rotation cap. Interface: keeps two pages for pools and settings, simplifies rotation settings to one limit, adds a Jellyfin library dropdown, and improves compact pool image previews.

Compatibility: target Jellyfin 10.11.0.0 for the full 10.11.x line. Security: bounded image downloads, safer URL validation, safe purge, and serialized rotation/purge operations. Performance: plugin-data pool storage with migration from media-folder .poster_pool directories and Jellyfin SaveImage rotation.
